name: ERP Gold EF Migrations Knowledge Pack
description: Generation-oriented rules a LocalAIFactory generator maps directly to code for committed EF Core migration history in a generated ERP core: a checked-in InitialCreate migration covering the deterministic 65-table model rather than runtime EnsureCreated; an IDesignTimeDbContextFactory so the EF CLI can build the DbContext without booting the web host; the startup project referencing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design; Database.Migrate() on SQL Server versus EnsureCreated() for portable SQLite test runs; the apply-migrations.ps1, generate-sql-script.ps1, and setup-sql-express.ps1 operator scripts; migration-presence and create-script verification tests; and the EnsureCreated stale-schema pitfall. Each item carries an explicit implementation implication and test implication, an applicability note, a worked example, a required limitation, a confidence level, and tags. All items are original summaries; no third-party text is reproduced.
license: Original professional summaries of widely-established EF Core migration and database-bootstrap principles, authored for LocalAIFactory. Free to deploy and modify within the application. No vendor documentation, ERPNext/Frappe, Microsoft, or other third-party copyrighted material is reproduced verbatim. Principles are framed with confidence levels; no jurisdiction-specific compliance or certification is asserted.
